title: illigera appendiculata subsp. appendiculata
intro: Illigera appendiculata subsp. appendiculata, also known as the Illigera vine or Tongkat Ali, is a plant species native to Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. Its health benefits are attributed to its ability to boost energy, enhance cognitive function, and support immune system health. The plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture for its herbal benefits, and it is also used as an ingredient in traditional remedies for various ailments.
